titleStmt.title: SII 10.453: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 453. (A.R. No. 98 of 1917.) ON FACE C OF THE SAME NANDI-PILLAR. Ś. 1204. (Chitrabhānu)

summary.p: States that a certain Mallayapreggaḍa who was the officer in charge of the grain depot (dhānyādhipa) of Viśvēśvara-Dēśika gave 50 sheep for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Viśvanātha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākādbē(bdē) yugapakṣacaṁdrasahitē śrīcitrabhānau śubhē varuṣē cāśvayujē māsi baha
ḷapakṣē tritiyyātithau śrīviśvēśvaradēsikasya viduṣō dhānyādhipō mallaya ścakrē dīpamakhaṁḍa ma
grajavara śrīviśvanāthāgrataḥ . bhāradvājagōtrulaina kommana pregaḍa koḍuku koṭṭaruvu
mallayapregaḍa tammu rakṣiṁcinadāta rācagurudēvarakuṁ buṇyamugānuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṁḍadī
pamu goṟelu 50 Idīpamu naḍapiḍikāṁpu bōdakā EṟabōIni koḍuku pinakallebōyuṁ
ḍunnu Ābammakoḍuku nūṁkebōyuṁḍunnu vīrika Okanivēśamunnu Oka vrittina 5 nitya māne
ṁḍu nētilekka Ācaṁdratārakamugā naḍapuvāru .
Note.—The chronogram yugapakṣacaṁdra means 124. This is evidently a mistake for 1204 which corresponds to Chitrabhānu.
Digital edition of SII 10.453 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
